topic: A gentle first-person slice-of-life story: a quiet rainy Sunday morning at home
title: A Rainy Sunday Morning

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: I wake up slowly to the sound of rain on the windows.

translations.ko: 창문에 떨어지는 빗소리에 천천히 잠에서 깨어났어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: It's Sunday, and I have nowhere to be.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: I make myself a cup of coffee in the quiet kitchen.

translations.ko: 조용한 부엌에서 커피 한 잔을 만들었어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: I sit by the window and watch the rain fall.

translations.ko: 창가에 앉아서 비가 내리는 걸 바라봤어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: The street outside is empty and peaceful.

translations.ko: 밖의 거리는 텅 비어 있고 평화로웠어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: I think about the busy week behind me.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: Right now, in this moment, everything feels perfectly still.

translations.ko: 지금 이 순간, 모든 것이 완벽하게 고요하게 느껴져요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: I'm grateful for this quiet morning.
